Our Story

Where Every Dish
Tells a Story

At Desi Calories, we bring the vibrant soul of Indian street food to the heart of Al Khobar. Each dish is crafted with intention — from the first sizzle of the karahi to the final flourish of fresh herbs.

Our kitchen spans continents — from charcoal-smoked kebabs and slow-cooked biryanis to bold Pan Asian wok dishes — united by one philosophy: honest, generous cooking.

Why Dine With Us

01

Family First

A warm, welcoming space designed for families — generous tables, attentive service, and a menu that pleases every generation.

02

Bold Authenticity

From Shinwari Karahi to Sichuan Kung Pao — every recipe stays true to its roots. No shortcuts, no compromises.

03

Order Anywhere

Dine in, take away, or order via Hungerstation. The same quality and care reaches your table or your door.
